codeReview.summary: Core reconciler plumbing and periodic integration landed, but there are blocking contract/correctness gaps: queued runs are treated as orphaned, ghost correction hard-resets status to todo instead of raw status, and the described run-vs-issue mismatch reconciliation step is not implemented.

issues.description: The reconciler treats both "queued" and "running" runs as orphan-candidates (`ACTIVE_RUN_STATUSES = ["queued", "running"]`). This can fail legitimate queued runs, while the feature contract specifies orphan closure for running runs (`features.json:1020`) and existing heartbeat behavior explicitly treats queued runs as legitimately waiting (`heartbeat.ts:1855-1863`).

Ghost projection correction unconditionally sets `issues.status` to "todo". The validation contract requires correction to the issue's raw status (`validation-contract.md:334`), so this can overwrite valid non-todo states and diverges from contract intent.

The feature description requires reconcile() to also compare run state vs issue state mismatches (`features.json:1020`, item d), but reconcile() only executes orphaned-run closure, stale-intent invalidation, and ghost-projection clearing (lines 436-442). The mismatch check path is missing.

Several secondary lookups are not explicitly company-scoped (e.g., issue fetch for stale intents at line 206, run/lease lookups at lines 326-340). This weakens the mission convention that all service queries include companyId (`mission AGENTS.md:29`).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Company-scoping is documented, but reconciler secondary lookups were still written without explicit company filters, suggesting guidance/tests do not strongly enforce this pattern in reviewable service code.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md:29 says all queries must include companyId; reconciler.ts uses unscoped lookups at lines 206, 326-340.

sharedStateObservations.observation: There is contract ambiguity/drift around "ghost projection corrected to raw status" vs implementation/tests asserting reset to todo.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: validation-contract.md:334 says corrected to raw status; reconciler.ts:361 sets status to "todo"; reconciler.test.ts:367-411 codifies todo expectation.

summary: Reviewed commit 0fe9de3e for reconciliation-service and found blocking contract-alignment issues: queued runs are incorrectly eligible for orphan closure, ghost correction overwrites status to todo instead of raw status, and the documented run/issue mismatch reconciliation step is missing. Report marked fail.
